title: PPL (PPL) Flat As Market Gains: What You Should Know
text: PPL (PPL) closed the most recent trading day at $30.17, making no change from the previous trading session.

title: 5 Low-Beta High-Yielding Stocks for a Likely Volatile January
text: In January, investment in low-beta stocks with a high dividend yield and a favorable Zacks Rank may be the best option. Five such stocks are: CAG, CNA, ETR, PPL and KMB.
